# terrible_awx_awx_bulk_job_launch (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `jobs` (String) List of jobs to create.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `description` (String) Optional description of this bulk job.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `extra_vars` (String) Any extra vars required to launch the job. Extends the extra_data field at the individual job level.
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `interval` (Number) The interval to request an update from the controller.
- `inventory` (String) Inventory name, ID, or named URL to use for the jobs ran within the bulk job, only used if prompt for inventory is set.
- `job_tags` (String) A comma-separated list of playbook tags to specify what parts of the playbooks should be executed.
- `limit` (String) Limit to use for the bulk job.
- `name` (String) The name of the bulk job that is created
- `organization` (String) If not provided, will use the organization the user is in. Required if the user belongs to more than one organization. Affects who can see the resulting bulk job.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `scm_branch` (String) A specific branch of the SCM project to run the template on. This is only applicable if the project allows for branch override.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `wait` (Boolean) Wait for the bulk job to complete.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `job_info` (String) dictionary containing information about the bulk job executed
